name: Stripe
reason: A/B test gateways by market; contract terms revisited quarterly

name: Adyen
reason: New regions and alternative payment methods; regional PSPs may be added

name: Twilio

name: TaxJar
reason: Stable; reevaluate if pricing or coverage changes

name: Avalara
reason: Backup option; not expected to change often

name: Sift

name: PostgreSQL
reason: Primary relational data store; not expected to change
